{ "name": "lru-cache", "description": "A cache object that deletes the least-recently-used items.", "version": "5.1.1", "author": "Isaac Z. Schlueter <i@izs.me>", "keywords": [ "mru", "lru", "cache" ], "scripts": { "test": "tap test/*.js --100 -J", "snap": "TAP_SNAPSHOT=1 tap test/*.js -J", "coveragerport": "tap --coverage-report=html", "preversion": "npm test", "postversion": "npm publish", "postpublish": "git push origin --all; git push origin --tags" }, "main": "index.js", "repository": "git://github.com/isaacs/node-lru-cache.git", "devDependencies": { "benchmark": "^2.1.4", "tap": "^12.1.0" }, "license": "ISC", "dependencies": { "yallist": "^3.0.2" }, "files": [ "index.js" ] }
